-- | A framework for code and document generation for scientific software - System SubPackage
--   
--   Please see the README on GitHub at
--   <a>https://github.com/JacquesCarette/Drasil#readme</a>
@package drasil-system
@version 0.1.1.0

module Drasil.System.Core

-- | Project Example purpose.
type Purpose = [Sentence]

-- | Project Example background information, used in the <tt>What</tt>
--   section of README.
type Background = [Sentence]

-- | Project Example scope.
type Scope = [Sentence]

-- | Project Example motivation.
type Motivation = [Sentence]
data SystemMeta
SystemMeta :: CI -> People -> Purpose -> Background -> Scope -> Motivation -> ChunkDB -> SystemMeta
[_sysName] :: SystemMeta -> CI
[_authors] :: SystemMeta -> People
[_purpose] :: SystemMeta -> Purpose
[_background] :: SystemMeta -> Background
[_scope] :: SystemMeta -> Scope
[_motivation] :: SystemMeta -> Motivation
[_systemdb] :: SystemMeta -> ChunkDB
class HasSystemMeta c_a7LU
systemMeta :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU SystemMeta
authors :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU People
background :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Background
motivation :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Motivation
purpose :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Purpose
scope :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Scope
sysName :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU CI
systemdb :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU ChunkDB
instance Drasil.System.Core.HasSystemMeta Drasil.System.Core.SystemMeta


-- | Define types and functions related to creating a system information
--   database.
module Drasil.System.OldSystem

-- | Data structure for holding all of the requisite information about a
--   system to be used in artifact generation.
data System
[SI] :: (Quantity h, MayHaveUnit h, Concept h, Quantity i, MayHaveUnit i, Concept i, HasUID j, Constrained j) => SystemMeta -> SystemKind -> String -> [TheoryModel] -> [GenDefn] -> [DataDefinition] -> [InstanceModel] -> [h] -> [i] -> [j] -> [ConstQDef] -> Map UID Reference -> Map UID [UID] -> Map UID [UID] -> System

-- | Enumeration of <i>kinds</i> of <a>System</a>s we can encode.
data SystemKind
Specification :: SystemKind
RunnableSoftware :: SystemKind
Notebook :: SystemKind
Website :: SystemKind

-- | Project Example purpose.
type Purpose = [Sentence]

-- | Project Example background information, used in the <tt>What</tt>
--   section of README.
type Background = [Sentence]

-- | Project Example scope.
type Scope = [Sentence]

-- | Project Example motivation.
type Motivation = [Sentence]
class HasSystem c_a9qg
system :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg System
constants :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg [ConstQDef]
dataDefns :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg [DataDefinition]
genDefns :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg [GenDefn]
instModels :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg [InstanceModel]
kind :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg SystemKind
meta :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg SystemMeta
programName :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg String
refTable :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg (Map UID Reference)
refbyTable :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg (Map UID [UID])
theoryModels :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg [TheoryModel]
traceTable :: HasSystem c_a9qg => Lens' c_a9qg (Map UID [UID])
class HasSystemMeta c_a7LU
systemMeta :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU SystemMeta
authors :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU People
background :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Background
motivation :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Motivation
purpose :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Purpose
scope :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU Scope
sysName :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU CI
systemdb :: HasSystemMeta c_a7LU => Lens' c_a7LU ChunkDB

-- | Probe what kind of <a>System</a> one is. For example, does it
--   represent a (Problem) specification, runnable software, a
--   <a>notebook</a>, or a website?
whatsTheBigIdea :: System -> IdeaDict

-- | Build a <a>System</a>.
mkSystem :: (Quantity h, MayHaveUnit h, Concept h, Quantity i, MayHaveUnit i, Concept i, HasUID j, Constrained j) => CI -> SystemKind -> People -> Purpose -> Background -> Scope -> Motivation -> [TheoryModel] -> [GenDefn] -> [DataDefinition] -> [InstanceModel] -> [h] -> [i] -> [j] -> [ConstQDef] -> ChunkDB -> [Reference] -> System

-- | Find what chunks reference a specific chunk.
refbyLookup :: UID -> System -> [UID]

-- | Find what chunks a specific one references.
traceLookup :: UID -> System -> [UID]
instance Drasil.System.OldSystem.HasSystem Drasil.System.OldSystem.System
instance Drasil.System.Core.HasSystemMeta Drasil.System.OldSystem.System

module Drasil.System
